# Micelle

**Summary**: A cluster of surfactant molecules that form in solution to reduce surface tension.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] discussed the role of micelle formation in surfactant behavior and its impact on IFT.

## Scientific Context

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] Micelle formation is a key step in the mechanism of surfactant-mediated IFT reduction.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022]] Not specified.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Gemini surfactants are more than 2 orders of magnitude in forming micelles compared to conventional surfactants. ([[2022-xiao|Xiao, 2022, p. 71]])
